meaning: <意>n.(意大利等欧洲大陆国家的)膳宿公寓,小旅馆
examples: He was pensione off and replaced with a younger man.
The Pensione Hotel is a reasonably priced and understated hotel in central Melbourne, reputedly modelled on a European Pensione.
Roast turkey, potatoes and Brussels sprouts were served to guests at the Pensione Bozzola in Milan on Christmas Day in 1938.
